CTA.primaryCopy: Coastal highways or alpine passes — the perfect drive begins with the perfect vehicle.
CTA.secondaryCopy: Start in Christchurch, finish in Queenstown — flexible drop-off made simple.
CTA.statsCopy: Fully maintained and available across all New Zealand locations, right now.

AboutPage.subtitle: New Zealand's trusted partner for reliable, comfortable and affordable car rental.

story.p1: YITU Car Rental is a New Zealand-based car rental company dedicated to providing reliable, comfortable, and affordable transportation solutions. We offer a wide range of well-maintained vehicles, from compact cars to spacious SUVs, suitable for both personal travel and business needs.
story.p2: Our mission is to make every journey smooth and enjoyable. With a focus on customer satisfaction, we provide flexible rental options, transparent pricing, and friendly support to ensure a hassle-free experience from booking to return.
story.p3: Whether you are exploring the beauty of New Zealand or traveling for work, YITU Car Rental is here to get you on the road with confidence.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.body: Every vehicle is thoroughly maintained and inspected before each rental — so you can drive with peace of mind.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.body: No hidden fees. What you see at booking is what you pay. Clear pricing, honest terms.

customerFirst.title: Customer First
customerFirst.body: Friendly support from reservation to return — we are always here when you need us.

FleetPage.available: {count} vehicles available — unlimited kilometres, comprehensive insurance included.

Gallery.subtitle: Real photos from our fleet, so customers can preview the vehicles they will actually travel in across New Zealand.
Gallery.emptyCopy: Upload real vehicle photos in the admin panel and they will appear here automatically.
